title: Automate Subitem label to match Item label
excerpt:
Hi, 
I want the Subitems of an item to automatically get tagged with the same tag as Item Label. 
is it possible? since the formula field can not fetch Item label in the subitem.

posts.author: Matias.rondissone (Matias Rondissone)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,
I want the Subitems of an item to automatically get tagged with the same tag as Item Label.
is it possible? since the formula field can not fetch Item label in the subitem.

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @Matias.rondissone,

Can I ask if you could setup the connect boards column and mirror the “tags column” into the subitem to achieve this?
